paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.59, with a change of -0.98% compared to the prior close and -26.59% over the past 22 sessions.

The recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as discussions about the company's governance and a recent convertible notes deal. A director's resignation due to governance concerns has also been reported.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. Other filings include a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K filings related to the issuance of convertible senior notes. There has been one new social post in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
